message:
Running command: # DRT PID 824793 running (31 min elapsed), iter 1 at 40%.
# DRT will run for many hours. Let me set up a durable monitoring loop
# using a background nohup script.

# Start background status monitor
nohup bash -c '
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=824793
while kill -0 $LR_PID 2>/dev/null; do
  sleep 600
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  DRT=$(grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | xargs | head -c 80)
  FGDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] alive($ELAPSED) $DRT" >> /tmp/drt_log.txt
  [ -n "$FGDS" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] FINAL_GDS=$FGDS" >> /tmp/drt_log.txt
done
echo "LR_DONE at $(date)" >> /tmp/drt_log.txt
tail -20 "$LOG" >> /tmp/drt_log.txt
' > /dev/null 2>&1 &

echo "BG monitor PID=$!"
echo "Log: /tmp/drt_log.txt"

# Now wait with 1-hour checks for up to 24h
for i in $(seq 1 24); do
  sleep 3600
  echo "=== $(date) ==="
  cat /tmp/drt_log.txt | tail -10
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p 824793 -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ] && echo "LR DONE!" && break || echo "LR running"
  FGDS=$(ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/final/gds/*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  [ -n "$FGDS" ] && echo "FINAL GDS: $FGDS" && break
  echo ""
done

function.name: execute_bash
